research_references.product_use: Privacy control mapping for accountability, consent, limiting collection/use/retention, safeguards, openness, access, and challenge rights.
research_references.source_name: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada PIPEDA principles

research_references.product_use: Breach-process, notification, and incident runbook requirements before real user data is accepted.
research_references.source_name: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada breach response guidance

research_references.product_use: Upload allowlisting, signature/type validation, generated filenames, size limits, authorization, isolated storage, malware checks, and CSRF.
AI prompt-injection review for uploaded files, source summaries, and reviewer work-order drafts.
AI governance framing for trustworthy design, evaluation, and human-review boundaries.
SMB-focused baseline controls for account security, backups, patching, monitoring, and incident readiness.
research_references.source_name: Canadian Centre for Cyber Security baseline cyber security controls

research_references.product_use: Govern, identify, protect, detect, respond, and recover control grouping.
Incident preparation, detection, analysis, containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons-learned runbook structure.
research_references.source_name: NIST SP 800-61 Rev. 2 Computer Security Incident Handling Guide

research_references.product_use: AI vendor data-use, retention, and endpoint-review input if OpenAI API processing is enabled later.
